bob.description: A deep voiced man with a subtle Australian accent and a measured speaking style.

nathan_fillion.ref_text: Okay, um, I'm lost, uh, I'm angry and I'm on. What was that? Tis-a-a! And I probably let it do that wrong. Nah, because then we will help the ship to spread us forward. Okay. You want to run this ship? Yes. Well, you can't. This is not Banefield's line. I feel the plot about a second. There's a lot of fine ways to die. I ain't waiting for the Alliance to choose mine.
